feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Employee as BP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently in the Go-Live phase of our project, and the HR module has not yet been implemented. However, the customer has requested that their Sales Employees be created as Business Partners in the production system.

At present, can we create these Sales Employees as Business Partners without assigning the Employee role (BUP003)? If so, when SAP SuccessFactors (or the HR module) is implemented later, will it be possible to link these same Business Partner records to the HR employee master data instead of creating new records?

If this approach is feasible, I would appreciate guidance on the configurations, master data settings, and best practices that should be considered now to ensure a smooth future integration with SuccessFactors/HR. Specifically, I would like to understand any critical settings that should not be missed during the initial Business Partner creation process to avoid issues during employee synchronization and integration at a later stage.

Please share your recommendations and experiences.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Header Freight condition in Purchase order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a procurement scenario where the Purchase Order is created for the actual material supplier, while freight charges are maintained through separate freight condition types with a different freight supplier.

In this case, the PO document currency is maintained as USD, and the freight condition type is entered in QAR currency. The requirement is to post separate invoices for the material supplier and the freight supplier, with each invoice adopting the respective currency maintained in the PO:

  • Material Supplier Invoice – USD
  • Freight Supplier Invoice – QAR

Could you please advise on the configuration settings and process steps required to achieve this scenario? Specifically, I would like to understand how SAP handles multiple currencies for planned delivery costs and whether any additional configuration is required to ensure that the supplier invoices are posted in their respective currencies.

Your guidance would be highly appreciated.

Best Regards

Dinesh

entry.title: How to create a custom tile of a custom analytical query for specific Bookmark
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,

I have a scenario such that i want to create a custom tile for each bookmarks that i have made in a custom analytical query. 

For example - Query "ZTRIP_DETAILS" have bookmarks saved:-
1. " Billed Trips"
2. " Unbilled Trips"

So I want to Create custom insight tiles of both the bookmarks in s4hana private cloud such that if user for example search for " Billed Trips - Trip Details" then only billed bookmark should open as an application.

Note:- My SAP Version is 2022 and i am working in s4hana private cloud.

Could you guys please help me build tile for each bookmarks of the query?
Also i have attached an image for your reference.
Thank you in advance.

Thanks
Vishal 

SAP HANA, platform edition

entry.title: AI and Joule Upskilling Guidance for SAP Functional Consultants
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The topics listed below are related to AI and Joule and are highly relevant to SAP Functional Consultants. Could you please share recommended learning paths, course links, blogs, or documentation that provide step-by-step guidance, configuration details, and structured learning approaches for these areas?

I am particularly interested in learning about -

Generative AI (LLMs, embeddings, and vector databases)

Agentic AI (multi-agent systems, planning, and reasoning)

AI lifecycle management

Machine Learning algorithms (supervised and unsupervised learning)

Neural networks

Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Prompt engineering

AI evaluation frameworks

Any resources, learning roadmaps, hands-on tutorials, or SAP-specific guidance that can help build knowledge and practical expertise in these topics would be greatly appreciated.

Additionally, please consider both SAP Public Cloud and Private Cloud environments when sharing resources and guidance related to the above topics.

Thank you in advance for your support and recommendations.

Best regards,
Ashish

entry.title: In fiori, unable to select cached item from dropdown list
entry.content:
In fiori,  some users (at least 3 users using 3 different computer ) are unable to select cached item from dropdown list, but if they select items from the list (eg: Material list) populated from sap database it works fine.

It was working fine some 2 days ago, I have tried clearing the cache and closing the browser but nothing worked.

we tried it on chrome and edge.

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: I am not getting the option New Standard Catalog button in Launchpad App Manager (Cross Client).
entry.content:
Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Co... - SAP Community

I am not getting the option New Standard Catalog in Launchpad App Manager (Cross Client). As per the SAP link we have to do the steps from 9 onwards.

entry.title: G/L Account Issue in ME21N for Service PO ZSRD
entry.content:
While creating a fresh PO in QA after SAP Upgrade to 2025 we are encountering below

G/L Account 41731XXX cannot be used.

 

We have tried to config the field selection in  OBC4 & OME9 for Cost Accounts but still we are getting this error

entry.title: Split WT for HU does not work in bulk storage type
entry.content:
Dear SAP.

    Currenly we found an issue for WT creation and confirm WT for storage type "Bulk" which is copy from SAP Standard (S. type 004) during create WT refer to ODO which is not split WT by HU stock in Bulk stock bin and system required to confirm WT with whole Qty of WT which is not split by item of each HU.

In EWM WH 3011 --> Storage Type 3010 

Picking in Bulk Storage setting

The HU Picking Control =1 (Propose Source HU as Destination HU) and Round Whole Units = 2 (Round Down WT Quantity to Single Unit)

And  the Round Whole Units =1 (Storage Type Decides) in WPT settings 

Issue in client 240, ODO = DO30000013

Storage Type: 3010

Storage Bin: 3010-C03

And I have added document for your referrence as the attached.

Best regards,

Chalermpol.

entry.title: Recommended naming convention for custom objects in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with ABAP Cloud in the context of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, and I would like to understand the recommended naming convention for custom development objects.

In classic ABAP development, custom objects are usually created using the Z* or Y* namespace, or a registered customer namespace. However, in ABAP Cloud, I would like to know what the recommended approach is for naming custom artifacts such as:

- Packages
- Classes and interfaces
- CDS views / CDS view entities
- Behavior definitions and behavior implementations
- Service definitions and service bindings
- Metadata extensions

Is there an SAP-recommended naming convention or best practice for these objects in ABAP Cloud?

For example, should we continue using Z*/Y*, use a specific prefix per application/domain, or follow a different convention aligned with Clean Core and ABAP Cloud development guidelines?

Any official SAP documentation, examples, or practical recommendations would be very helpful.

Thank you.

entry.title: DECIMALS FOR VALUE
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a scenario where values in the system are currently maintained with 2 decimal places, and the historical data has already been uploaded into the productive system accordingly.

The client has now requested that values be maintained with 4 decimal places going forward. Before proceeding, we would like to understand the implications of making this change in a live environment.

Could you please advise on the following:

  • Is it possible to change the decimal precision from 2 to 4 decimal places in an SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud system after go-live?
  • What is the recommended approach and configuration required to implement this change?
  • Will changing the decimal precision impact existing master data, historical transactions, open documents, reports, interfaces, or financial postings?
  • How will the system handle historical records that were created and stored with 2 decimal places?
  • Are there any SAP notes, restrictions, or best practices that should be considered before implementing this change in a productive system?

Any insights on the potential risks, system impact, and implementation steps would be greatly appreciated.

Best Regards,
Dinesh

entry.title: KE396 Inconsistency between document field and profitability segment using BAPI_PO_CREATE1
entry.content:
We are encountering the error message KE396 - "Inconsistency between document field and profitability segment number" while creating a Purchase Order using BAPI_PO_CREATE1.

The Purchase Order uses Account Assignment Category 'K' (Cost Center).

The same Purchase Order can be created successfully using transaction ME21N with exactly the same business data (Vendor, Material, Plant, G/L Account, Cost Center, Quantity, etc.). The issue occurs only when the Purchase Order is created through BAPI_PO_CREATE1.

entry.title: S/4HANA PLM (PCE 2025): Is Product Relationship officially supported for customer-specific property
entry.content:
**Area:** SAP S/4HANA PLM — Product Structure Management (PSM) / PLM Web UI
**Release context:** SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (PCE) 2025**Tags:** SAP S/4HANA, Product Lifecycle Management, PLM-PSM, Extensibility,
Customer Attributes

---

### Background

We are running **SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (PCE) 2025** with the
following stack (taken from the Fiori Launchpad "About" dialog):

- SAP S/4HANA 2025
- ABAP PLATFORM 2025
- SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2025
- SAP S/4HANA PRIVATE CLOUD 2025
- SAP FIORI SAP S/4HANA PCE 2025
- SAP FIORI FES 2025 FOR S/4HANA
- Launchpad F6252, version 2025.0.23 / UI5 1.136.0

In this environment we are using the **classic S/4HANA PLM stack** — i.e.,
**Product Structure Management (PSM)** / **iPPE** entities exposed through
**PLM Web UI** and the corresponding Fiori apps — *not* the SaaS product
"SAP Integrated Product Development" (PLM_EPD on SAP BTP).

### What we already did successfully

We have **already extended `Product Item Variant`** with customer-specific
properties using the **SAP-supported customer attribute / property
extension mechanism** for PSM. The extension is in productive use, with
the custom attributes:

- Visible in the standard UI (PLM Web UI / Fiori app)
- Persisted via the standard customer-extension framework (no core
modification)
- Behaving correctly in product structure browsing and editing

So the end-to-end extension path for `Product Item Variant` is clearly
supported and works as expected on our PCE 2025 release.

### What we need to confirm

We now have a comparable business requirement to extend the
**`Product Relationship`** entity (the product-to-product relationship
object in PSM / iPPE) with customer-specific attributes — for example,
to capture the nature, classification, validity context, or
business-specific qualifiers of a relationship between two products.

Our question is therefore very specific:

> **In SAP S/4HANA PLM (PCE 2025), is `Product Relationship` an
> officially supported target object for customer-specific property /
> attribute extension, in the same way as `Product Item Variant`?**

### What we have already checked

- [Product Item Variant — SAP Help Portal](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/6c2745726a9c4cd5930f6596fea01b74/654df94679ba4ee4b9e4876f1490fc28.html)
- The PSM / iPPE configuration nodes in the IMG for our PCE 2025 system
- The standard customer attribute extension framework we used
successfully for `Product Item Variant`
- BAdI and customer-include enhancement options associated with PSM /
iPPE objects

In all of the above, the documented and demonstrated extension targets
include **Product Item Variant** (and related PSM objects), but we
could not find an explicit statement — positive or negative — about
**`Product Relationship`** being included in the officially supported
scope.

### Specific questions

1. Is **`Product Relationship`** part of the officially supported set of
PSM / iPPE objects that can be extended with customer-specific
attributes/properties on S/4HANA 2025?
2. If **yes**, could you point us to:
- The relevant SAP Help Portal section / SAP Note,
- The recommended **extension technique** (e.g., customer include /
append structure on which table, which BAdI, which IMG node), and
- Any **standard UI** (PLM Web UI / Fiori app) that will display the
extended fields without custom UI development?
3. If **no**, is `Product Relationship` extensibility on the **product
roadmap** for an upcoming S/4HANA release or SAP Note? If so, is
there an indicative timeline or a Customer Influence entry we can
follow and vote on?
4. If `Product Relationship` is **not** in scope for the standard
customer-attribute extension framework, what is the
**SAP-recommended pattern** to attach customer-specific attributes
to a product-to-product relationship in PSM? For example:
- Modeling those attributes on the related `Product` or
`Product Item Variant` instead, and deriving the relationship
semantics from there?
- Using **Key User Extensibility (Custom Fields, app F1481)** on the
underlying CDS view exposing the relationship, if available?
- Implementing a dedicated **BAdI / enhancement spot** to persist
and expose custom attributes on the relationship object?
- Any other officially supported, upgrade-safe extension path?

### Why this matters

Confirming the supported scope upfront is important for us to:
- Avoid custom workarounds that may not be upgrade-safe on future
S/4HANA releases,
- Align our data model with SAP's intended extensibility direction
for PSM / iPPE,
- Ensure our extension can be reused by standard PLM Web UI / Fiori
apps and standard reporting (CDS-based analytics, embedded
analytics).

Thank you very much in advance to SAP product experts and to fellow
customers / partners who have implemented a similar requirement on
S/4HANA PLM.

---

**Environment summary**
- SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (PCE) 2025
(ABAP Platform 2025, S/4HANA Foundation 2025)
- SAP Fiori for S/4HANA 2025, SAP Fiori FES 2025
- Fiori Launchpad (F6252) 2025.0.23 / UI5 1.136.0
- PLM stack in use: Product Structure Management (PSM) / iPPE /
PLM Web UI
- Already-confirmed working extension: `Product Item Variant`
customer-specific properties
- Target object for this question: **`Product Relationship`**

entry.title: PAYM_ADV OPD Config is not Working for Custom Service
entry.content:
We are doing RAP based Adobe form and which trigger through OPD config.

But while testing we found OPD works only for standard service which in written in case condition.

Custom service : ZSB_A2R_PAYMENTADVISE

Standard Service :FDP_FFO_PAYM_ADVICE_SRV & FDP_FFO_PAYM_ADVICE_BR_SRV

PAYM_ADV OPD

entry.title: CAT2 T-code - User is able to select Created and deleted networks from F4 help
entry.content:
Hi,

In CAT2 T-code, when user selects Network using F4 help, it displays values of all network irrespective of status.

The business users want to restrict the search based on status so that they can filter out networks with created or deleted status . This will reduce the errors when trying to save and avoid manual correction of data

entry.title: Fiori elements app value help field with fuzzy search does not allow sorting on fields
entry.content:
In a Fiori elements List Report app using OData V2, SAP UI5 version: 1.120.41, S4HANA 2023.

We have a value help field in the smart filter bar, and it allows fuzzy search. But applying sorting annotations does not allow to sort on particular fields. How to enable sorting in this case?

There is a Revision field in smart filter bar, whose value help entity set is "C_REVISION_VHType" . It has fuzzy search on "MaintenanceRevision" field and "Description" field. We want to apply sorting in "Descending" order for "MaintenanceRevision" field when user starts typing in the input field.

We tried following annotation from UI, through local annotation file. And similar annotation from CDS as well, but its not working.               

Following is the code snippet added in local annotation file:

Please suggest if this is feasible and if yes, how can we address this requirement.

entry.title: Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 601 X X B L _ E)
entry.content:
Hello Everyone !!

While performing PGI in T Code VL02N I am getting the below error -
Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 601 X X B L _ E)
Message No. M7226

I tried to fix this in OMJJ - But it doesn't allow to add or copy new entries (Can someone confirm if its authorization issue or SAP behavior)

As per few SAP notes I also tried maintaining the entry in SM30 --> V_156X_VC, but it didnt help. 

Can someone give a strong resolution.

Thanks & Regards,
Mohit S Rohera

entry.title: Hiding Condition type
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our client's requirements is to not to show the inventory price of the Material to the Salesman. While in the Sales quotation and Sales order Pricing procedure the PCIP Condition type displays the Internal Price which is used to calculate the Profit margin of the Material. This Profit margin value is used in the SAP Standard sales reports because of this I can't remove this condition type from the Pricing procedure, so i want to hide this conditon type in the screen without removing its function in the Sales quotation and Sales order. Please provide me the possible way to achive this requirement or suggest any workaround for this requirement.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Error during Dhareeba upload via BTP – Custom PO Document Type not accepted
entry.content:
While executing the Dhareeba upload program via SAP BTP, the system fails during Purchase Order creation when using a custom PO document type.

The error is observed in the API response captured via browser DevTools → Network tab.

Error Message (from API response) XML<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>API_MM_PUR_PO/064</code>
<message xml:lang="en">Use purchase order type "Standard" ("NB") or a type copied from "NB".</message>
<innererror/>
</error>
Show more lines Observed Behavior

  • The API rejects the custom PO document type.
  • The system explicitly restricts usage to:
    • Standard PO type NB, or
    • Document types copied from NB.

Expected Behavior

  • The system should allow processing of custom PO document types configured in the system (including those not directly copied from NB), or
  • Documentation/clarification should

entry.title: Unable to access BI reports via LPD_CUST configuration after upgrade to S/4HANA 2023.
entry.content: Hi Team, We are facing an issue after upgrading our system from S/4HANA 2021 to S/4HANA 2023. Before Upgrade (Working Scenario): - We were accessing BI (external system) reports from Fiori Launchpad. - Configuration was done using: • Application Type: SAP Fiori App using LPD_CUST • Transaction: LPD_CUST - A Launchpad Role (e.g., ZSAP_BI) and Instance (ANALYTICS) was created. - URLs for BI reports (BOE OpenDocument links) were maintained in LPD_CUST. - Corresponding Target Mapping was created in Fiori Launchpad Designer. - When users clicked the tile: → System redirected to BI system → User entered credentials → Report opened successfully After Upgrade (S/4HANA 2023): - The same configuration is either not working or not supported. - We understand that Launchpad Designer and LPD_CUST based integrations are deprecated/obsolete. - We are unable to identify the correct approach/tool to reconfigure this setup. Current Requirement: We need to enable Fiori tiles to launch external BI reports (BOE URLs) similar to the previous setup.

entry.title: FIori ID:F1079（PIR更新） アプリが開けない
entry.content: FIori ID:F1079（PIR更新） を開いた際に「ターゲットが見つかりません。Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getMetadata') 」というメッセージが表示され、アプリを利用することができない。
